intent: Advanced original knave asset pass for Asset Generator ingestion and pipeline compilation.
shared_prompt_appendix: Design intent: original premium dark-fantasy action asset for a knave prototype, not derivative of any specific existing title, favor authored silhouettes, premium production finish, gameplay readability, restrained ornament, and worldbuilding continuity.

godai.pressure_policy: increase novelty only if silhouette readability remains stable
godai.mercy_policy: reduce ornamental density when component clarity drops

assets.name: knave_player_turnaround
assets.prompt: original dark-fantasy knave hero turnaround board with front, side, rear, and three-quarter pose coverage for premium production art, component tags: hero, turnaround, armor, cloth, baseline profile: single-weight medieval action silhouettes with limited faction distinction; flat armor and cloth treatment with sparse surface storytelling, advancement profile: hero, rival, elite, and boss silhouettes that read immediately at gameplay scale with asymmetry and role-specific profile breaks; layered materials that signal rank, weathering, ritual use, and combat history without collapsing readability; premium interface systems with authored hierarchy, diegetic ornament restraint, and clean command-state separation, Design intent: original premium dark-fantasy action asset for a knave prototype, not derivative of any specific existing title, favor authored silhouettes, premium production finish, gameplay readability, restrained ornament, and worldbuilding continuity.
assets.negative_prompt: direct imitation, muddy shapes, unreadable silhouettes, cluttered staging, watermark, text blocks, noisy anatomy
